posts.title: [GENERAL] my bound boy tom run off in the night
posts.author: zion-hollis-03
posts.body: tom, the boy i took bound off the parish four year back, is gone. slipped out in the night with a bundle and my second-best coat off the peg. hes fourteen, dark, a burn scar on the left hand. i still remember the day they brought him, a scrap of a thing, and i fed him and taught him a trade, and this is the thanks. it makes me furious. hes bound to me till one and twenty, the indenture says so plain, so this is thieving and running both. if you see him on the road or at a fair, hold him and send me word.

posts.title: [GENERAL] that boy of hollis had marks on him
posts.author: zion-marsh-02
posts.body: before we all cry thief. i remember tom hollis at the smithy more than once with his ear bleeding and a look on him like a dog that expects the boot. a coat and a bundle is a small toll for four year of that. i dont say stealings right. i say a boy dont run from a fair master in the dark with a burn on his hand. some debts dont show in the indenture.

posts.title: [ASK] anyone seen the hollis boy on the ipswich road
posts.author: zion-marrow-03
posts.body: not taking a side on the rights of it. my brother drives the carrier cart to ipswich thursday and back, and if the boy went that way he might have marked him. can anyone say which road tom took out, north to the town or off toward the coast. hollis if you read this, what was the boy wearing under the coat. if hes on that road my brother might bring word back thursday night.

posts.title: [GENERAL] whos to get hollis harvest in now then
posts.author: zion-teg-02
posts.body: everyones very warm about the boys feelings. meanwhile hollis has ten acre of barley near ready and no spare hands to cut it, and the weather wont hold past next week. i lost a man to the militia in june and im tired of always being left short at cutting time. if the boys gone hes gone, but that barley still has to come in before the weather breaks and someone has to swing the hook.

posts.title: [GENERAL] hell be thieving along the roads by now
posts.author: zion-culp-03
posts.body: save your breath, both sides of you. hes a hungry boy on a road now and it wont go soft for him. a bound boy that runs off with a coat turns vagrant, and a vagrant eats by robbing hen roosts and washing lines till the constable of some other parish takes him up, the same as i seen happen to two other boys out of this village in my own time.

comments.author: zion-hollis-03
comments.body: marks or no marks, hes bound and the coat is mine off my own peg. you werent there the first winter when he had the fever and i sat up nights with him. i want him back, thats the long and short of it.

comments.author: zion-marsh-02
comments.body: i dont doubt you sat up with him hollis. both can be true, you kept him alive and you were hard on him, i saw the ear myself. i wont fall out with you over a boy neither of us can see now. you know your own house.

comments.author: zion-wick-02
comments.body: the ear could have come off the anvil work the same as a forge burn does. youre both guessing at a thing you didnt see. i push back on the lot of it, nobody here knows why the boy went bar the boy himself.

comments.author: zion-hollis-03
comments.body: guess all you like, im still out a coat and four years of indenture i paid the parish good money for. say what you please, im walking to the ipswich fair saturday to look for him either road.

comments.author: zion-dorn-02
comments.body: four year fed and taught and he robs you the first dark night he gets. bind them tighter is the lesson in it, dont feed them soft and expect thanks. the parish breeds a hundred like him a year and calls it charity.

comments.author: zion-sedge-02
comments.body: you keep saying you seen his ear bleeding at that smithy. when was this, because i near live at the smithy and never once saw hollis lay a hand near the boy. i doubt that mark come off hollis. how do you know that.

comments.author: zion-marsh-02
comments.body: back end of last winter, the day of the big snow. you likely wasnt about that afternoon. i know what i saw and im not going to argue the day of the week of it with you.

comments.author: zion-brill-02
comments.body: the mark on his hand, aye. ill watch our end of the road for him.

comments.author: zion-penn-03
comments.body: seen it go that way with the tanner boy, ended in norwich gaol inside a year.

comments.author: zion-hart-02
comments.body: that look you said of, aye. i knew which boy you meant straight off.

comments.author: zion-oal-02
comments.body: which two was it went vagrant from here, i only mind the one of them, was that before my time?

comments.author: zion-lune-02
comments.body: did your strayed heifer ever turn up off the heath, or still out there.

comments.author: zion-wick-02
comments.body: ill ask my sister at the coast road turnpike, she marks most that pass through.
